title: scleranthus annuus subsp. tauricus
intro: Scleranthus annuus subsp. tauricus, also known as Knawel, is a subspecies of the Scleranthus annuus plant, a member of the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in herbal remedies for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Scleranthus annuus subsp. tauricus include relief from menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. Scleranthus annuus subsp. tauricus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal remedies, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
